full_text:
Xu Sheng (Wenxiang) 徐盛 (文嚮)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Sheng (徐盛), styledWenxiang (文嚮), was born in Langxie in Ju. Served in Chibi and Wu’s invasions into Wei. Tricked Cao Pi with a fake wall. Xu Sheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Xu Sheng lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
